	dragon,

Bones the skeleton has 4 hit points and says *rattle*.
Nibblez the vampire is dead.
Bones the skeleton has 4 hit points and says *rattle*
Blarg the skeleton has 4 hit points and says *ROAR*
Mort the zombie has 61 hit points and says *growl*
